@semawfs6 Hey Sema, Thank you! That means a lot to hear. 😊 We built Zoho Tables with exactly that goal in mind—keeping the familiarity of spreadsheets while giving you the power of a real database, without the complexity. We're glad the views and automations are hitting the mark. If there's anything you'd love to see next, we'd love to hear your ideas!

Pelin [...] Promoted

Archanaa

Hunter

📌

Excited to hunt Zoho Tables today. Spreadsheets break the moment work gets collaborative. Real databases need a developer. Zoho Tables sits right in between: describe what you need, Zia builds the base, and the same data flows into Grid, Calendar, Gallery, Gantt, Form, and Kanban with zero exports. A few highlights to look out for: automations that kill the busywork, reports that stay current on their own, and a mobile app that spins up a base by voice with Siri and lets you annotate images with Apple Pencil. I'll let the makers (the engineering, design, and product team) share what they set out to solve and how it came together. Give it a try and let them know what you think.

# Zoho TablesAlternatives

Exploring Zoho Tables? Compare it with Airtable, an AI-native platform for visual databases; Coda, which blends docs, tables, and automations; ClickUp, an all-in-one project hub; and Fibery, a flexible company OS. These tools offer richer views, deeper automations, and extensibility when your team outgrows basic spreadsheets.

results.title: Zoho: An integrated suite of business apps | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.6

Based on 24 reviews

Review Zoho?

Reviewers mostly see Zoho as a practical, affordable suite for small businesses, especially for CRM, accounting, payroll, and broader workflow management. They often praise its breadth, useful automation, and integrations across Zoho products, with some calling it intuitive once learned. The main complaints are a clunky or slow interface, occasional bugs, confusing email integration, and a setup experience that can feel overwhelming because of the many settings and features. One manager also says Zoho Cliq and Zoho People work well for goals and performance tracking, though time tracking has limits.

•7 reviews

My experience with Zoho Books has been generally positive. The program was intuitive and easy to learn, even without extensive accounting training. Automating many routine tasks, such as invoicing and payment tracking, significantly simplified my work. I appreciated the integration with other Zoho products, which allowed for a unified ecosystem for business management The mobile app was very convenient for managing finances on the go, especially during trips. However, there were occasional challenges with setting up specific tax rates and currencies, which required extra effort Overall, Zoho Books helped optimize accounting processes and save time, which is a big plus for small businesses

Joseph McWhirter [...] I have been using Zoho Cliq and Zoho People for some time now, and I must say that they have been effective tools for managing my team's performance and KRA. With these tools, I am able to set goals and track the progress of my team members, which has helped us to stay on track and achieve our objectives. The performance tracking feature in Zoho People is particularly useful, as it allows me to monitor individual and team performance, and identify areas where improvement is needed.  
  
Overall, I would highly recommend Zoho Cliq and Zoho People to other managers and teams looking for an effective performance management and KRA tracking tool. While it may have some limitations in terms of time tracking, it more than makes up for it with its strong features in other areas.

results.title: Refrens: Mange Invoicing, Accounting, Inventory, Sales, and more. | Product Hunt
results.content:
5.0

Based on 30 reviews

Review Refrens?

Reviews praise Refrens for fast, intuitive invoicing and quotes, easy quotation-to-invoice conversion, and strong CRM, inventory, and expense tracking in one place. Users highlight WhatsApp/email sharing, automated payment reminders, multi-entity and multi-client management, clean templates, and great value. Many note reliable support—often responsive late at night—and steady product improvements that save time over spreadsheets and alternatives like Zoho. Minor asks include purchase-order conversion and reusable note templates. Overall, freelancers, agencies, and SMBs find it efficient for staying organized, improving cash flow, and simplifying everyday finance tasks.
